diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I topped up a 4.99 Welkin Moon two weeks ago and I wanted to ask if it actually auto-renews, because I thought it would and I didn't get charged again.
[Agent] Great question, and thank you for thinking to check. The Welkin Moon is actually a one-time purchase, not a subscription, so it does not auto-renew. Each 30-day period requires a new purchase. Some players miss this and lose a few days between renewals.
[Caller] Oh okay, I see. So do I need to buy it again today to keep the daily Primogems going?
[Agent] Let me pull up your account to check the exact expiry date. Could I have your UID?
[Caller] 803990456.
[Agent] And to verify identity, your HoYoverse email?
[Caller] apatel at email dot com.
[Agent] Thank you, you're verified. I see your Welkin from order ORD202604150002, purchased April 15th, so your last daily Primogem claim is today, April 21st. Wait, let me recheck, actually that looks wrong on my end.
[Caller] Oh?
[Agent] My apologies, I misread. Your Welkin is active through May 14th. You have about three weeks left on your current cycle, so no rush to repurchase today. One tip, I usually recommend players set a calendar reminder two days before expiry, that way you can repurchase right before it ends and your daily rewards never lapse.
[Caller] That's really helpful. I'll do that.
[Agent] Also worth mentioning, if you do want to stack, you can buy a second Welkin while the current one is still active and the new 30 days will queue on top of the existing one. Some players bundle it with the first-top-up bonus too, though you've already claimed that.
[Caller] Yeah I got the bonus last year. Okay, this is perfect, thank you so much.
[Agent] My pleasure, Aisha. Enjoy your daily Primogems, and have a wonderful adventure in Teyvat!
